name: Jerry Lewis' Vinegar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the eggs.
3. Add vanilla and blend well.
4. Add melted bitter chocolate.
5. Sift flour with salt, then add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour milk.
6. Mix together baking soda and vinegar and add to the mixture.
7. Pour into 2 greased 9-inch layer pans.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
